description: Comprehensive observability dashboard for multi-region Agentic AI platform spanning East US (kagent agents), West US (LLM Gateway + MCP Gateway), and South Central US (Azure Foundry GPT 5.4 mini).

panels.description: Current agentgateway version from build info
panels.title: Agentgateway Version

panels.description: Total LLM protocol requests across all gateways
panels.title: Total LLM Requests

panels.description: Total MCP requests (tool calls and protocol requests)
panels.title: Total MCP Requests

panels.description: Percentage of LLM requests returning HTTP 200
panels.title: LLM Success Rate

panels.description: Average LLM request duration from GenAI server metrics
panels.title: Avg LLM Latency

panels.description: Total downstream connections across all gateways
panels.title: Active Connections

panels.description: Rate of LLM protocol requests per second, stacked by HTTP status code
panels.title: LLM Request Rate

panels.description: LLM request latency at p50, p95, and p99 percentiles for successful requests
panels.title: LLM Request Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Rate of input and output token consumption for GenAI requests
panels.title: Token Usage Rate

panels.description: Total accumulated tokens by type (input, output, input_cache_read)
panels.title: Total Tokens by Type

panels.description: Rate of requests through the MCP gateway by HTTP status code
panels.title: MCP Request Rate

panels.description: MCP gateway request latency at p50, p95, and p99 percentiles
panels.title: MCP Request Latency

panels.description: Total MCP tool call invocations
panels.title: MCP Tool Calls

panels.description: Upstream connection establishment time by transport (TLS/TCP) at p50, p95, p99
panels.title: Upstream Connect Time

panels.description: Rate of response bytes per second broken down by route
panels.title: Response Bytes by Route

panels.description: Downstream received (ingress) and sent (egress) bytes per second
panels.title: Downstream Traffic In/Out

panels.description: Rate of non-200 (error) requests per second by gateway and status code
panels.title: Error Rate by Gateway

panels.description: Distribution of total requests by HTTP status code across all gateways
panels.title: Requests by Status Code

panels.description: Pod status across agentgateway-system, kagent, and default namespaces
panels.title: Pod Status

panels.description: CPU usage rate per pod in agentgateway-system and kagent namespaces
panels.title: CPU Usage by Pod

panels.description: Working set memory usage per pod in agentgateway-system and kagent namespaces
panels.title: Memory Usage by Pod

title: Multi-Region Agentic AI Platform
